name: Kids Popcorn Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the molasses and corn syrup in a saucepan until it reaches a hard crack stage, about 270 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Stir in the melted butter and salt until well combined.
3. In a large bowl, mix the prepared popcorn with the molasses mixture using a wooden spoon until all the popcorn is evenly coated.
4. Using your hands lightly greased with butter, shape the popcorn into desired-sized balls.
5. Place the shaped popcorn balls on wax paper to allow them to harden completely.
6. Store any remaining popcorn balls wrapped in wax paper for later consumption.
